title: Array Practice Problems
description: Practice problems to reinforce array concepts and operations

quickPractice.title: Quick Practice Templates
quickPractice.description: Simple templates for trying out array operations

problems.title: Array Element Reversal
problems.description: Write a function to reverse the elements of an array
hints: Create a new array and fill it from the end of the original array
Alternatively, swap elements from both ends moving towards the center
Consider using built-in reverse functions for simpler implementation

problems.title: Find Maximum Element
problems.description: Write a function to find the maximum element in an array
hints: Initialize a variable with the first element as the current maximum
Iterate through the array and compare each element with the current maximum
Update the maximum whenever you find a larger element

problems.title: Remove Duplicates
problems.description: Write a function to remove duplicate elements from an array
problems.timeComplexity: O(n?) naive, O(n) with hash set
hints: Use a hash set or map to track seen elements
For a naive approach, check each element against all previous elements
Consider using built-in data structures like Set in some languages
